description: Measured the current baseline in the dedicated baseline worktree.
Measured the current baseline in the dedicated baseline worktree.
No adaptation needed. P-stage SwiGLU activation replacement ran successfully without errors.
No adaptations or fixes needed - entrypoint ran successfully on first attempt

Fixed RMSNorm parameter handling in optimizer setup. The issue was that RMSNorm layers have 1D weight parameters, but they were being passed to the Muon optimizer which expects 2D matrices. Separated 1D scalar params (RMSNorm weights, ve_gate weights) to use AdamW instead of Muon. Also added the final ln_f weight to the optimizer groups which was previously missing.
Disabled model compilation (compile_model=False) to fix missing setuptools runtime error, and reduced device_batch_size from 32 to 16 to fix OOM error
